summary: A leak suggests Microsoft is creating a budget Xbox Game Pass tier named 'Triton', focusing on first-party games like Fallout 4 and Gears 5. The move comes amidst rumours that Xbox CEO Asha Sharma wants to make Game pass more affordable

summary: Indonesia starts implementing social media restrictions for children under 16

title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
summary: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

title: Sony to raise PlayStation 5 price to offset soaring memory chip costs. Here's how much it will cost now
summary: Effective 2 April, the new US pricing will set the standard Sony PlayStation 5 at $649.99, up from $549.99.

title: Sharp launches India's first window AC with active air purification: Check price, specs, and features
summary: Sharp has launched the Ryohu-FS fixed-speed window ACs with capacities from 1.41 to 1.70 tons. The new window AC lineup comes with a 5-year warranty with prices starting at ₹34,490 in India.

title: Google employees are flocking to ‘Agent Smith’ AI tool to automate coding tasks from their phones: Report
summary: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

title: Meet Claude Mythos: Anthropic accidentally leaks unreleased AI model with severe cybersecurity risks
summary: Anthropic's upcoming AI model, Claude Mythos, was leaked due to a ‘human error’. The leaked blog also revealed a new AI tier, Capybara, which could sit above the Claude Opus tier.&nbsp;

title: Austria plans social media ban for under-14s, cites ‘addictive algo’ - When, how will it roll out? All you need to know
summary: Ministers from the three ruling parties reportedly said they have reached an agreement in principle on introducing the ban – which is aimed at protecting children from ‘addictive algorithms’ and harmful content, including sexual abuse

title: WhatsApp' big update ends iOS-to-Android transfer restrictions and introduces dual accounts for iPhones
summary: WhatsApp's latest update has introduced some new features like dual accounts on iOS, cross-platform chat transfer, and improved storage management. The company also now allows users to manage large files in specific chats and take adavantage of Meta AI for photo editing and writing suggestions

title: IPL 2026 begins: Google unveils interactive doodle with live scores feature
summary: Marking the commencement of one of the biggest sporting spectacles in the country, Google on Saturday unveiled a special Doodle titled Indian Premier League 2026 to celebrate the opening of the tournament's 19th edition.

title: AI deepfakes blur reality in 2026 US midterm campaigns
summary: AI-generated deepfake political ads are increasingly used in US campaigns, often misleading voters with fabricated content. With limited regulation and weak safeguards, experts warn these tools could erode trust in elections, as their realism makes them persuasive and difficult for audiences to dete

title: Live Translate with Headphones: Google expands feature to more countries across iOS, Android
summary: The company first rolled it out in December last year, integrating Gemini’s translation capabilities into Google Translate for text. As of December, the Translate app supported more than 70 languages.

title: Live Translate with Headphones: Google expands feature to more countries across iOS, Android
summary: The company first rolled it out in December last year, integrating Gemini’s translation capabilities into Google Translate for text. As of December, the Translate app supported more than 70 languages.

title: Nokia trims 20% global workforce; 75,000 employees impacted: Report
summary: The job cuts will result in over 14,000 roles being affected globally and come amid broader restructuring at the mobile network maker. The company’s India workforce will also be impacted.

title: Urban Company’s quick service vertical InstaHelp surpasses 1 million monthly bookings in March
summary: Urban Company’s quick-service offering scaled rapidly within a year of launch to hit this milestone, underlining strong demand for instant housekeeping. This comes as rival startups also scale fast, amid rising competition and investor interest in the fast-growing segment.

title: Info Edge commits Rs 250 crore to deeptech fund; sells Shopkirana stake
summary: Info Edge, which was an early investor in Zomato, said the fund will be sponsored and managed by Info Edge’s subsidiary Smartweb Internet Services and support early-stage deeptech startups in India.

title: Here’s how countries are cracking down on kids’ social media use
summary: As concerns over online safety increase, governments around the world are tightening rules on children’s access to social media. In India, several states have moved to restrict access to social media for children.

title: Cyber threats moving from data theft to physical life risks: Deloitte cyber lead
summary: Gaurav Shukla, partner and leader - cyber at Deloitte South Asia, explained that a cyber attack on a medical device altering patient data could be fatal, while a hack on power generation and transmission components could cause severe national blackouts.

title: Rentomojo files draft prospectus for Rs 1,100-1,200 crore IPO
summary: Rentomojo has filed a draft red herring prospectus (DRHP) with the Securities and Exchange Board of India for an initial public offering of Rs 1,100-1,200 crore.
